zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡上行中的区间突破试探
zh.content:
当前AVAX处于低位反弹后的震荡上行结构，价格站上20日均线6.57附近后维持强势整理，多头动能温和释放，但上方抛压仍存，短线进入盘整上沿测试阶段

技术指标方面，MACD为正值0.0685显示多头动能仍在延续，但信号线缺失使趋势确认略弱，RSI未提供导致超买超卖判断受限

SMA20当前位于6.575构成短期支撑核心，价格上方阻力关注6.82及前高6.8257区域，若突破则有望打开上行空间扩展

操作上建议短线偏多思路，回踩6.57-6.60区间分批布局多单，止损设于6.52下方，若放量突破6.83可顺势加仓执行

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is trading around 6.76, showing a mild recovery after a short consolidation phase near the 6.60–6.70 zone. Price action suggests a gradual upward drift over the last 24 hours, but momentum remains restrained rather than impulsive. The structure is still range-bound on lower timeframes, with buyers defending dips while sellers cap upside near recent intraday highs around 6.82. This indicates a transitional phase awaiting a breakout confirmation.

Momentum indicators show a cautiously bullish bias. MACD at 0.0685 remains above the zero line, suggesting underlying positive momentum, though the absence of a signal line reading limits crossover clarity. With SMA(20) at 6.57496, price is trading above the short-term average, reinforcing mild bullish structure. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed reliably at this stage.

Immediate support is forming around 6.60, with stronger structural support near the 6.57 SMA(20) region. A break below this zone could expose downside pressure toward 6.50. On the upside, resistance is clearly located near 6.82, aligning with recent highs, followed by a secondary barrier around 6.90 where selling pressure may intensify. Price remains compressed between these levels. This compression often precedes a volatility expansion once direction is chosen.

Short-term traders may consider range strategies, buying near support around 6.60–6.57 and taking partial profits near resistance at 6.82. For breakout traders, a confirmed close above 6.82 could signal continuation toward 6.90 and beyond, while failure to hold 6.60 may shift bias back to bearish momentum. Risk management remains essential given the compressed volatility environment and lack of strong directional indicators.
